pages.title: Performance Overview
pages.narrative: Total revenue stands at ₹208,255,582 with an average margin of 13.26%. Customer rating averages 4.08/5.

pages.title: Category Deep-Dive
pages.narrative: Technology dominates revenue. Furniture requires margin improvement attention.

pages.title: Regional & Channel Mix
pages.narrative: South leads regionally. Organic is the top acquisition channel.

pages.title: Customer Experience
pages.narrative: Return rate at 4.55%. Delivery speed improvements can drive rating uplift.

pages.title: Strategic Priorities
pages.narrative: Expand top category, fix margin leakage in weak categories, optimise channel spend, target delivery SLA ≤5 days.
